contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: CI: move Playwright off PR gate → post-deploy against live beta (3 repos)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp_beta/pull/2
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/118
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/147
  
  Details:
  Pattern: PR CI runs unit/lint only (fast, reliable, gateable). Playwright (interface tests) moves to a separate workflow triggered on a successful github-pages deployment_status and runs against the LIVE deployed beta — so we test what users actually get, not localhost or a PR-time build. This unblocks the truesight_autopilot /ship gate (previously, dapp_beta's flaky Playwright kept the gate from ever merging).
  
  - dapp_beta#2: ci.yml → unit tests only; new playwright-beta.yml against https://beta.dapp.truesight.me; playwright.config.ts: PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL env override + conditional webServer.
  - agroverse_shop_beta#118: visual-consistency.yml → deployment_status trigger; config already auto-routes to beta.agroverse.shop in CI.
  - truesight_me_beta#147: same trigger change; playwright.config.ts: baseURL is now PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL-overridable (default stays prod for local/manual); workflow sets it to https://beta.truesight.me.
  
  Local dev npm test still works as before in all three. First post-deploy run may surface visual-baseline diffs to refresh (especially truesight_me_beta, which previously hit prod URL).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
